Summary.raw: GitHub Action: mirror curated branch from private repo to public repo

Body.raw: Automate pushing a public-showcase branch from a private repo to a separate public repo via GitHub Actions. On push to the public-showcase branch in the private repo, squash/mirror that branch to main on the public repo using a PAT stored as a secret. Lets private work stay private while selectively exposing polished material.

AC: Action triggers on push to public-showcase branch; pushes to public repo main; uses PAT secret for auth; force-push to keep public history clean; no private branch history leaks
